title: partition table tiflash replica can't be ready
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
```
CREATE TABLE employees4 (
    id INT NOT NULL,
    fname VARCHAR(30),
    lname VARCHAR(30),
    hired DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT '1970-01-01',
    separated DATE DEFAULT '9999-12-31',
    job_code INT,
    store_id INT NOT NULL
)

PARTITION BY RANGE (store_id) (
    PARTITION p0 VALUES LESS THAN (6),
    PARTITION p1 VALUES LESS THAN (11),
    PARTITION p2 VALUES LESS THAN (16),
    PARTITION p3 VALUES LESS THAN (21)
);
alter table employees4 set tiflash replica 1;
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
tiflash replica ready
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
tiflash replica not ready
tidb log is as follows
```
[2023/04/21 07:39:16.169 +00:00] [WARN] [tiflash_manager.go:131] ["region count getting from PD is 0."] [tableID=95]
[2023/04/21 07:39:16.169 +00:00] [ERROR] [ddl_tiflash_api.go:501] ["get tiflash sync progress failed"] [error="region count getting from PD is 0"] [tableID=95]
```
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
release-7.1
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE employees5 (id INT NOT NULL, fname VARCHAR(50), lname VARCHAR(50), hired DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT '1970-01-01', separated DATE DEFAULT '9999-12-31', job_code INT, store_id INT NOT NULL, salary DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00);
ALTER TABLE employees5 ADD PARTITION (PARTITION p0 VALUES LESS THAN (5), PARTITION p1 VALUES LESS THAN (10), PARTITION p2 VALUES LESS THAN (15), PARTITION p3 VALUES LESS THAN (20));
INSERT INTO employees5 (id, fname, lname, hired, separated, job_code, store_id, salary) VALUES (1, 'John', 'Doe', '2023-01-01', NULL, 101, 3, 50000.00);
INSERT INTO employees5 (id, fname, lname, hired, separated, job_code, store_id, salary) VALUES (2, 'Jane', 'Smith', '2023-02-01', '9999-12-31', 102, 7, NULL);
key_bug_features: tiflash replica not ready after partition table creation
